meta.title: Clairo — Understand any contract. In any language. Instantly.
meta.description: Clairo explains what your contract says in plain language. Not legal advice — clear understanding.

trust.title: Before we begin
trust.statement1: Your document is deleted immediately after analysis. It is never saved.
trust.statement2: Your document is never shared with anyone or used for AI training.
trust.statement3: This is not legal advice. We explain. You decide.

upload.drag_or_tap: Drag a file here, or tap to select
upload.accepted_types: PDF, DOCX, JPG, PNG, HEIC · Max 25 MB
upload.options_label: Or choose another way to upload
upload.camera_label: Open camera to photograph a document
upload.gallery_label: Choose a photo from your gallery
upload.privacy_reminder: Your document is never stored. Analysed in memory and deleted immediately.

error.type: File type not supported. Please use PDF, DOCX, JPG, PNG, or HEIC.
error.size: File is too large. Maximum size is 25 MB.

disclaimer.label: Legal disclaimer
disclaimer.upload: Clairo provides AI-generated summaries for informational purposes only — not legal advice. Always consult a qualified lawyer before signing.
disclaimer.review: Review carefully: AI extraction may contain errors. You are responsible for verifying all text, especially numbers, dates, and party names, before proceeding.

errors.404Message: The page you are looking for does not exist.
errors.500Message: We encountered an error. Your document was not stored.

issue.too_dark: Too dark — move to better lighting

error.permission_hint: Allow camera access in your browser settings to take photos.

review.heading: Review Your Document
review.subheading: Verify the text extracted from "{filename}" before analysis. Tap any word to correct it.
review.empty_page: No text detected on this page.

warning.low_words: {count} word(s) could not be read clearly — please verify.
warning.number_words: {count} number(s) or amount(s) detected — always verify these carefully.

review.confirm_label: I have reviewed and confirmed the text above is accurate before proceeding to analysis.
review.confirm_hint: You must confirm the text is correct before continuing.
